message:
🐛 fix: Check event_name to prevent errors on push events

Added check for github.event_name == 'issues' to prevent
the workflow from trying to access issue-specific fields
when triggered by push events (validation runs).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -17,7 +17,11 @@ permissions:
 
 jobs:
   ai-fix:
-    if: (github.event.action == 'labeled' && github.event.label.name == 'ai-fix-requested') || (github.event.action == 'opened' && contains(github.event.issue.labels.*.name, 'ai-fix-requested'))
+    if: |
+      github.event_name == 'issues' && (
+        (github.event.action == 'labeled' && github.event.label.name == 'ai-fix-requested') ||
+        (github.event.action == 'opened' && contains(github.event.issue.labels.*.name, 'ai-fix-requested'))
+      )
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 
     steps:
